title: Cardholder Data Encryption at Rest
description: Render PAN unreadable using strong cryptography wherever stored.

title: Mask PAN When Displayed
description: Mask PAN when displayed (first six and last four digits maximum) per Requirement 3.4.

title: Strong Cryptography in Transit
description: Use TLS 1.2 minimum for all cardholder data transmission over open networks.

title: Sensitive Authentication Data Storage Prohibition
description: Do not store sensitive authentication data after authorization (CVV, full track data).

title: Need-to-Know Access
description: Limit access to cardholder data by business need-to-know with documented RBAC.

title: Multi-Factor Authentication
description: Implement MFA for all non-console administrative access and remote access to CDE.

title: Strong Password Policy
description: Enforce password length 12+ chars, complexity, and rotation per Requirement 8.3.

title: Audit Trail for Cardholder Data Access
description: Log all access to cardholder data with user identification, event type, and timestamp.

title: One Year of Log Retention
description: Retain audit logs for at least one year with three months immediately available.

title: Daily Log Review
description: Review logs and security events daily with documented procedures.

title: Quarterly Vulnerability Scans
description: Conduct internal and external vulnerability scans quarterly and after significant changes.

title: Annual Penetration Testing
description: Perform external and internal penetration testing annually and after significant changes.

title: Secure Coding Practices
description: Develop software using secure coding practices including OWASP Top 10 protections.

title: Code Review Before Production
description: Review custom code prior to production release for security vulnerabilities.

title: Token Vault Segregation
description: Segregate token vault from CDE with strict access controls when using tokenization.

title: Cryptographic Key Lifecycle
description: Manage cryptographic keys with documented lifecycle from generation through destruction.

title: CDE Network Segmentation
description: Implement network segmentation to isolate CDE from other systems.

title: Incident Response Plan
description: Maintain documented incident response plan with cardholder data breach procedures.

title: Service Provider Due Diligence
description: Maintain documented due diligence for service providers handling cardholder data.

title: Information Security Policy
description: Maintain documented information security policy reviewed at least annually.

title: Lawful Basis for Processing
description: Document lawful basis (consent, contract, legitimate interest) before processing personal data.

title: Right of Access
description: Respond to data subject access requests within one month with personal data export.

title: Right to Erasure
description: Implement right-to-be-forgotten with verifiable deletion across systems and backups.

title: Granular Consent for Marketing
description: Obtain freely given, specific, informed consent for marketing communications.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Data Protection by Design
description: Implement appropriate technical and organizational measures by design and default.

title: Cross-Border Transfer Safeguards
description: Use SCCs, BCRs, or adequacy decisions for personal data transfers outside EEA.

title: Records of Processing Activities
description: Maintain Article 30 records of processing activities.

title: Data Minimization
description: Process only personal data adequate, relevant, and limited to purpose.

title: Purpose Limitation
description: Collect personal data for specified, explicit, and legitimate purposes.

title: California Consumer Privacy Rights
description: Honor CCPA rights including right to know, delete, opt out of sale, non-discrimination.

title: Do Not Sell My Personal Information
description: Provide Do Not Sell My Personal Information link in retail website footer.

title: CPRA Right to Correct
description: Honor CPRA right to correct inaccurate personal information.

title: CPRA Sensitive PI Limitation
description: Provide right to limit use of sensitive personal information per CPRA.

title: Virginia CDPA Rights
description: Honor Virginia Consumer Data Protection Act rights.

title: Colorado Privacy Act
description: Comply with Colorado Privacy Act including universal opt-out.

title: Connecticut Data Privacy Act
description: Comply with Connecticut Data Privacy Act for CT consumer data.

title: Utah Consumer Privacy Act
description: Comply with Utah Consumer Privacy Act for UT consumer data.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC Common Criteria for security.

title: Availability Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement availability controls including monitoring, capacity, and DR.

title: Processing Integrity Controls
description: Implement processing integrity ensuring complete, valid, accurate, timely, authorized processing.

title: Confidentiality Controls
description: Identify, classify, and protect confidential customer information.

title: Role-Based Access Controls
description: Implement RBAC with periodic review and removal upon termination.

title: Continuous Monitoring
description: Implement continuous monitoring of system performance and security events.

title: Vendor Risk Management
description: Assess and monitor vendors with access to systems or data.

title: ISMS Establishment
description: Establish, implement, maintain, and improve an Information Security Management System.

title: Annual Risk Assessment
description: Conduct documented information security risk assessments at planned intervals.

title: Cryptographic Controls Policy
description: Define and implement policy on cryptographic controls including key lifecycle.

title: GoBD Digital Record Retention
description: Retain digital records per German GoBD principles for German retail customers.

title: GoBD Invoice Storage
description: Store invoices per GoBD with audit trail and immutability.

title: German BDSG Specifications
description: Apply BDSG specifications to GDPR processing for German customers.

title: PECR Marketing Consent
description: Obtain consent before marketing electronic communications per ePrivacy.

title: Cookie Consent for Trackers
description: Obtain explicit consent for non-essential cookies and tracking technologies.

title: TCPA Telemarketing Compliance
description: Comply with TCPA before automated retail outreach via SMS or auto-dialer.

title: CAN-SPAM Email Compliance
description: Comply with CAN-SPAM Act for commercial email communications.

title: FTC Section 5 Compliance
description: Avoid unfair or deceptive acts or practices in retail marketing.

title: Magnuson-Moss Warranty Act
description: Comply with federal consumer product warranty disclosure requirements.

title: Truth in Advertising
description: Provide truthful, substantiated claims in retail advertising per FTC guidelines.

title: Endorsement and Testimonial Disclosure
description: Disclose material connections in endorsements per FTC guidelines.

title: Influencer Marketing Disclosure
description: Require influencer disclosure of paid partnerships per FTC guidance.

title: Wayfair Sales Tax Nexus
description: Collect sales tax in states with economic nexus per South Dakota v. Wayfair.
citation: South Dakota v. Wayfair 138 S Ct 2080

title: EU VAT One-Stop Shop
description: Use OSS for B2C cross-border distance sales of goods within EU.

title: EU IOSS for Low-Value Imports
description: Use Import One-Stop Shop for B2C goods up to EUR 150 from non-EU.

title: EU Right of Withdrawal
description: Provide 14-day right of withdrawal for distance contracts per Consumer Rights Directive.

title: Pre-Contractual Information
description: Provide pre-contractual information including total price and digital content interoperability.

title: Price Reduction Indication
description: Indicate prior price for reductions per EU Omnibus Directive.

title: Authentic Reviews
description: Verify product reviews are authentic and disclose verification process.

title: EU Product Liability Directive
description: Apply EU Product Liability Directive to defective product compensation.

title: EU General Product Safety Regulation
description: Comply with GPSR (EU) 2023/988 for consumer product safety.

title: EU Digital Services Act for Marketplaces
description: Comply with DSA online marketplace obligations including KYC traders.

title: EU Digital Markets Act
description: Comply with DMA where designated as gatekeeper or operating on gatekeeper platforms.

title: EU Right to Repair
description: Provide spare parts, repair info, and software updates per Right to Repair Directive.

title: WEEE Directive Compliance
description: Register and report electrical equipment per WEEE Directive.

title: RoHS Hazardous Substances
description: Restrict hazardous substances in electrical equipment per RoHS Directive.

title: REACH Chemical Registration
description: Register substances per REACH Regulation for EU chemical use.

title: Strong Customer Authentication
description: Apply SCA for electronic payments with two of three factors.

title: PSD2 PIS/AIS Support
description: Support PSD2 Payment Initiation and Account Information Services where required.

title: WCAG 2.1 Level AA
description: Meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility for retail website.

title: European Accessibility Act
description: Comply with European Accessibility Act for products and services from June 2025.

title: ADA Title III Web Accessibility
description: Meet ADA Title III accessibility for US retail websites.

title: COPPA for Children's Retail
description: Obtain verifiable parental consent for retail data from children under 13.

title: FCRA for Retail Credit Decisions
description: Provide adverse action notice for retail credit application denials based on credit reports.

title: FACTA Red Flags Rule
description: Implement Identity Theft Prevention Program for covered retail accounts.

title: Electronic Fund Transfer Disclosures
description: Provide EFT disclosures including liability limits and dispute procedures.

title: Credit Card Disclosure
description: Provide TILA credit card disclosures including APR, fees, and grace period.

title: CARD Act Compliance
description: Comply with Credit CARD Act protections including fee limits and rate increase notices.

title: Loyalty Program Disclosure
description: Provide clear loyalty program terms including expiration and redemption rules.

title: CARD Act Gift Card Rules
description: Comply with CARD Act gift card expiration and inactivity fee restrictions.

title: Negative Option Marketing
description: Comply with FTC Negative Option Rule for auto-renewing subscriptions.

title: ROSCA Online Disclosures
description: Comply with Restore Online Shoppers Confidence Act for online retail.

title: Return Policy Disclosure
description: Display return policy clearly per state laws (e.g. CA Civ Code 1723).

title: Money Service Business Compliance
description: Comply with BSA when retail operates as money service business (gift card, money order).

title: OFAC Customer Screening
description: Screen customers and vendors against OFAC SDN list.

title: Robinson-Patman Price Discrimination
description: Avoid prohibited price discrimination in B2B retail per Robinson-Patman Act.

title: Sherman Act Compliance
description: Avoid agreements in restraint of trade and monopolization per Sherman Act.

title: EU Vertical Block Exemption
description: Comply with EU Vertical Block Exemption Regulation in distribution agreements.

title: Trademark Infringement Avoidance
description: Avoid trademark infringement in product naming, marketing, and packaging.

title: DMCA Safe Harbor
description: Maintain DMCA safe harbor for user-generated content with takedown procedures.

title: EU AI Act for Retail
description: Classify retail AI tools (recommendations, pricing, fraud) per EU AI Act.

title: Illinois Biometric Privacy Act
description: Obtain written consent before collecting biometric identifiers (face, fingerprint) in IL retail.
